instructions.title: Job Training Notes
instructions.text: Listen to job instructions and write them so clearly that someone else could follow them
instructions.audio: Take notes like you're training someone

audioInstructions.title: How to Make a Latte
audioInstructions.audio: To make a latte first pull a double shot of espresso into a 12-ounce cup next steam milk to 150 degrees then pour steamed milk into the cup over espresso and finally top with a thin layer of foam

audioInstructions.title: How to Process a Return
audioInstructions.audio: To process a return first ask for receipt then scan the item barcode next select return on register after that process refund to original payment method and finally give customer receipt for the return

audioInstructions.title: How to Pack an Order
audioInstructions.audio: To pack an order first check order sheet for items next gather all items from shelves then scan each item barcode after that place items in appropriate box size add packing material seal box and finally print shipping label and attach to box

evaluation.testMethod: AI simulation tests if instructions work

perfect.message: Perfect instructions! Anyone could follow these! 🏆

good.message: Good instructions! A few details to add 👍

needsWork.audio: Add more specific steps and numbers
